template_context.shared_plan_summary: Cycle 1: Architecture definition for static HTML/CSS polar bear conservation webpage with mobile-first responsive design, semantic structure, and clear content organization.

interface_highlights.name: HTML Document Interface
interface_highlights.description: Semantic HTML5 structure defining content sections: header, hero, threats, solutions, footer

interface_highlights.name: CSS Styling Interface
interface_highlights.description: External stylesheet providing responsive layout, typography, colors, and visual presentation

interface_highlights.name: Asset Interface
interface_highlights.description: Image directory structure for polar bear visuals and conservation graphics

architecture_decisions: {"decision": "Pure static HTML/CSS implementation", "rationale": "Meets all acceptance criteria with minimal complexity, fast loading, and easy deployment"}
{"decision": "Mobile-first responsive design approach", "rationale": "Ensures accessibility across all device sizes from smartphones to desktops"}
{"decision": "Semantic HTML5 structure with clear content sections", "rationale": "Improves accessibility, SEO, and maintainability while meeting acceptance criteria"}
{"decision": "External CSS stylesheet with separation of concerns", "rationale": "Clean architecture allowing independent styling updates and better organization"}
